    DailyListeningStatsService - Class in com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.handlers

    Assembles the dashboard graph panel and orchestrates data loading.

    Asynchronous data loader backed by a fixed thread pool.

    deletePlaylist(Long) - Method in class com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.service.PlaylistService
    Time Complexity: O(1) cascade delete to be handled by database Space Complexity: O(1)
